evals.prompt: Here is my execution plan. Generate a deployment-ready CREATE INDEX script for the most impactful indexes. I need to take it to my DBA tomorrow.
evals.expected_output: Ranked Index Advisor Report with CREATE INDEX DDL using ONLINE = ON, SORT_IN_TEMPDB = ON. Each with Source (operator-derived D1-D8 vs optimizer suggestion), Impact score, and rationale. Deduplication where derived and suggested overlap.

evals.prompt: I have 12 .sqlplan files from a workload trace. Give me one consolidated index script.
evals.expected_output: Cross-plan merge with deduplication, ranked by aggregate impact across all 12 plans. CREATE INDEX statements grouped by table, with comments showing which plans drove each recommendation.
